title: The AI-powered Era of Scientific Discovery Is Here - Ep. 25 with Dr. Bradley Love
title_zh: 人工智能驱动的科学发现时代已经到来-第25集与Bradley Love博士
full_text: Dr. Bradley Love is building a tool that can predict the future. Dr. Bradley Love is transforming neuroscience research with AI. He's the creator of BrainGPT, a large language model that can predict the results of neuroscience studies—before they’re conducted. And it performs better than human experts. We spent 90 minutes exploring how AI is reshaping scientific research and our understanding of the brain. Bradley argues that as scientific knowledge grows exponentially, we need new tools

## clean_text

Dr. Bradley Love is building a tool that can predict the future. Dr. Bradley Love is transforming neuroscience research with AI. He's the creator of BrainGPT, a large language model that can predict the results of neuroscience studies—before they’re conducted. And it performs better than human experts. We spent 90 minutes exploring how AI is reshaping scientific research and our understanding of the brain. Bradley argues that as scientific knowledge grows exponentially, we need new tools
